name: Campspot Campground Management API
what_it_does: Campspot REST API for campground and RV park reservation management platform. Enables AI agents to manage site availability and reservations, process booking requests and deposits, retrieve guest profiles and camping history, handle rate management and seasonal pricing, manage amenity and equipment rentals, integrate camping data with marketing systems, and connect campground operations with outdoor recreation platforms.
use_cases: Managing campsite availability and reservation requests from campground operations agents
Processing booking deposits and payments from reservation automation agents
Retrieving guest profiles and camping history from outdoor hospitality agents
Managing seasonal rate changes from campground revenue management agents
not_for: Hotel and traditional hospitality without camping/outdoor recreation focus
Large national park systems without private campground management
Event venues without multi-night outdoor hospitality workflows
best_when: A privately-owned campground, RV park, or glamping resort using Campspot wants AI agents to automate reservation management, site availability, guest communication, and pricing workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Guest personal data and booking information requires careful handling. Outdoor recreation businesses may have additional state and local permit requirements for AI-automated guest management.

auth.notes: Campspot uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Park-level credentials. Partner program for OTA and integration developers. API access included with subscription.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — campground management SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-park monthly pricing; marketplace distribution included
pricing.notes: Grand Rapids, Michigan company, founded 2013. Leading campground management and distribution platform. Network of 1,200+ parks. Strong OTA distribution through campspot.com marketplace.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Guest personal and booking data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with API key or OAuth2
No granular scopes — verify access control model
US-focused camping network — limited support for international parks
Seasonal availability patterns require careful site occupancy logic
OTA marketplace reservations may have different cancellation policies than direct bookings
agent_readiness.security_notes: Guest personal and payment data. PCI-DSS. API key and OAuth2. US data residency. Campground marketplace and management platform.

security_score_components.security_notes: Guest and booking data. PCI-DSS. API key and OAuth2. US data residency only.
